---
title: "Sivalingam S M"
description-meta: "Assistant Professor, Department of Mathematics, National Institute of Technology Warangal"
image: "images/profile.jpg"

page-navigation: false
toc: false
page-layout: full

about:
  id: hero-heading
  template: trestles
  image: images/profile.jpg
  image-width: 65%

  links:

    - icon: envelope
      text: Email
      href: mailto:sivalingam@nitw.ac.in

    - icon: github
      text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/SivalingamSM
      target: _blank

    - text: "{{< ai google-scholar >}} Google Scholar"
      href: https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=ezCkT1QAAAAJ&hl=en
      target: _blank

    - text: "{{< ai orcid >}} ORCID"
      href: https://orcid.org/0000-0003-0818-9007
      target: _blank

    - text: "{{< ai researchgate >}} ResearchGate"
      href: https://www.researchgate.net/profile/Sivalingam-S-M
      target: _blank

listing:
  - id: recent-posts
    contents:
      - posts
      - posts/post-links.yml
    type: grid
    page-size: 3
    max-items: 3
    fields: [image, title, subtitle, date]
    sort:
      - "date desc"
---
